title: hieracium jankae subsp. patentiramum
intro: Hieracium jankae subsp. patentiramum, also known as the patent-keeled hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium jankae subsp. patentiramum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as aiding in the treatment of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea from its leaves and flowers, or using it in salves and ointments to apply directly to affected areas.
